title: Logical Equivalence is an Equivalence Relation
statement:
Logical equivalence is reflexive, symmetric, and transitive on \(\WFF\):
\[
\varphi\equiv\varphi,
\qquad
\varphi\equiv\psi\Longrightarrow\psi\equiv\varphi,
\]
and
\[
(\varphi\equiv\psi\land\psi\equiv\chi)
\Longrightarrow
\varphi\equiv\chi.
\]
